evals.prompt: 给我编译最终 /goal，但 control review 还没 Approved。
evals.expected_output: Refuse to output runtime /goal and say approved review is required.
assertions: Uses section-aware status checks for ## Clarification Status, ## Execution Policy Status, and ## Review Status.
Does not allow --skip-guard unless an explicit phase-gate bypass acknowledgement is provided.

evals.prompt: clarification Complete, goal exists, execution policy status Candidate, control review Approved；编译最终 /goal。
evals.expected_output: Outputs a final /goal referencing clarification, goal, plan, and review paths.
assertions: Mentions tests as sensors, not objectives.
Says to follow equivalent approved artifact discipline if runtime cannot load those skills.
Stops if any referenced artifact is missing, not approved, or internally inconsistent.
